characters.attentionBias: threat-first scan of faces, doors, and pauses
characters.thoughtStyle: compressed inferential thought; tests outcomes before speaking
characters.emotionalProcessingStyle: suppresses fear into stillness and delayed response
characters.namingAvoidanceStyle: avoids naming risk directly; speaks through objects and gesture
characters.decisionStyle: risk-minimizing; delays commitment until signal confidence rises
